job_text: Junior Data Analyst role requiring Python, SQL, pandas, Excel and reporting dashboards. Candidate should have 1+ years experience or internship experience, a bachelor degree, teamwork, communication and stakeholder collaboration.

Business Intelligence Analyst role requiring SQL, Excel, Power BI or Tableau, dashboard design, data cleaning, reporting automation, stakeholder communication and business KPI analysis. Candidate should have 2+ years experience in analytics or reporting.

Machine Learning Intern role requiring Python, pandas, scikit-learn or PyTorch, data preprocessing, model evaluation, statistics and clear technical reporting. Candidate should have project or internship experience and willingness to learn.

Data Engineering Assistant role requiring Python, SQL, ETL basics, data pipelines, data quality checks, cloud awareness and collaboration with analytics teams. Candidate should understand databases, scripting and reliable data workflows.
